table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid;

list.li: Before starting this work, confirm that the machine power is turned OFF and that all machine operations are stopped.
This procedure requires the operator to enter inside the machine or work within a small area, and so careful attention is needed during the work.

Be sure to place a warning tag on each operation panel, main power switch, and other locations when performing work to ensure that other personnel do not turn on the power inadvertently which could result in the machine being operated.
When operating the machine, maintain clear communication with everyone in the area to ensure operator safety.

para.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-left:26px; font-family:'Arial Unicode MS'; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.text: Install 1x M8 Eyebolt onto ATC arm cover [1] hosting hole [2] to lift and position at the installation location. Secure the ATC arm cover by using 9x M5x10

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px; margin-left:26px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-left:26px; page-break-before:always; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;

li.text: Install 3x M12 Eyebolt onto ATC cover [1] hosting hole [2] to lift and position at the installation location. Secure the ATC cover by using 8x M8 washers (OD18mm) and 8x M8x25 Socket head screws.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
text-align:center; page-break-before:always;

li.text: Install 1x M8 Eyebolt onto ATC inner cover [1] hosting hole [2] to lift and position at the installation location. Secure the ATC cover by using 4x M5x10 Truss head screws on ATC cover side and then 3x M6x10 Truss head screws on ATC side.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
text-align:center; page-break-before:always;

list.li: Slide the Chip Tray, ATC cover [1] under the ATC cover and position it under the ATC magazine. Secure the Chop tray by using 2x M5 washer and 2x M5x10 Truss head screws.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px;
text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:-1px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:1px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:4px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
text-align:center; page-break-before:always;

list.style: margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:26px; font-family:Arial; font-size:11pt; color:#000000;
list.li: Install Cover Top LH [1] using 6x M5x10 Truss head screws and then Cover bottom middle [2] using 9x M5x10 Truss head screws.

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;
text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px;

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

text-align:center; margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:10px; margin-left:26px;
margin-top:6px; margin-bottom:6px; page-break-before:always;
